calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2004 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Daniel F. Sullivan, Esq. for Petitioner: Joel E. Martinez, present as guardian ad litem for Joel Martinez, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
A net balance of $15,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with
Wells Fargo Bank, 1 Montgomery St., San Francisco, until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in court.
